nasb.text: So David sent and inquired about the woman. And one said, “Is this not Bathsheba, the daughter of Eliam, the wife of Uriah the Hittite?”

esv.text: And David sent and inquired about the woman. And one said, “Is not this Bathsheba, the daughter of Eliam, the wife of Uriah the Hittite?”

cnv.text: 大衛派人去查問那婦人是誰。有人說：“這不是以連的女兒、赫人烏利亞的妻子拔示巴嗎？”

ccb.text: 大卫就派人去打听这个女人是谁，得知她是以连的女儿、赫人乌利亚的妻子拔示芭。
